Simply paste the YouTube Shorts link, click download, and save the video in HD quality directly to your phone or computer.
This YouTube Shorts to MP4 tool works on all devices and browsers with no app installation required.

Paste the YouTube Shorts URL into the CONVERT1S YouTube Shorts downloader above.
Click the download button and save the YouTube Shorts video to your device in MP4 format.
